en-US.name: Varroa Timing: Mite Treatment
en-US.subtitle: Beekeeping Hive Care Forecast
en-US.promotional_text: Keep bees? Check this week's forecast against each mite product's label limits and see which treatments fit your colony today. Per-hive TREAT, WAIT, or DON'T.
en-US.description:
Which varroa treatment can you use this week? Varroa Timing turns your colony's condition and the coming forecast into one clear reference - TREAT, WAIT, or DON'T - so you can see which mite products fit today.

Every beekeeper knows the problem: a mite product that was fine last week is off the table this week because the forecast turned hot, or your supers are on, or the brood is capped. The label limits exist, but cross-checking temperature windows, super rules, and brood state for every hive is nobody's idea of fun.

HOW IT WORKS

1. Enter your colony: mite count, brood state, supers on or off, hive material.
2. Varroa Timing checks the 7-day temperature forecast for your location.
3. You get a per-colony reference - which products fit today, which to wait for, and which don't fit this week - with the reason for each.

Under a minute to set up. No account required.

CORE FEATURES

Today's Reference
A single read per colony plus the why - your mite level against the seasonal action threshold, and which products sit inside their published label limits right now.

Product Library
Temperature windows, super rules, brood notes, and re-entry intervals for common mite products including oxalic acid (dribble and vapor), formic acid, thymol, and amitraz - with the source noted for each.

Mite Count Log
Record alcohol wash or sugar roll results and see them against the seasonal threshold instantly.

PRO FEATURES
Upgrade to Pro for deeper insights:
- Unlimited colonies
- 7-day forecast window planner per product
- Brood-cycle schedule and re-dose timing
- Rotation tracking to vary products across the season
- Super re-entry countdown per colony
- Push reminders for upcoming treatment windows

PRIVACY FIRST
- No account, no login
- All data stored locally on your device
- Location is used only to fetch a local temperature forecast from Open-Meteo. Coordinates are never stored on any server.
- No tracking, no ads, no third-party analytics

Varroa Timing provides informational timing guidance based on public weather data and published product labels. It is not a substitute for guidance from your local extension or an experienced beekeeper. Always read and follow each product's label.
